phases.description: Etsy store setup, supplier outreach, inventory printing

tasks.task: Business registration (LLC or sole proprietor)
tasks.success_criteria: Business entity registered, EIN obtained (if LLC)

tasks.task: Product liability insurance activated
tasks.success_criteria: Insurance policy active, certificate received

tasks.task: Create Etsy shop account (shop name, location, hours)
tasks.success_criteria: Shop created, settings saved, name locked in

tasks.task: Connect bank account to Etsy payments
tasks.success_criteria: Bank account linked, verification deposits pending (2-3 days)

tasks.task: Submit tax identification form (W-9 or EIN)
tasks.success_criteria: Tax ID submitted in Etsy system, form complete

tasks.task: Create shipping profiles (USPS Ground Advantage, Priority Mail optional)
tasks.success_criteria: Profiles created, zone rates verified, test checkout works

tasks.task: Configure return policy (30-day satisfaction guarantee)
tasks.success_criteria: Return policy active, seller pays for returns enabled

tasks.task: Create policy pages (About, Terms, Privacy, Return policy)
tasks.success_criteria: All policy pages published, terms legally sound

tasks.task: Upload shop banner and profile image
tasks.success_criteria: Banner visible on shop, professional appearance

tasks.task: Product photography (5 photos per SKU minimum)
tasks.success_criteria: 5 photos per product, 2048x2048px, hero + context + detail shots

tasks.task: Write product descriptions (5 listings, 2000+ characters each)
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 product descriptions drafted, SEO-optimized, warranty info included

tasks.task: Research and assign product tags (13 tags per listing, eRank verification)
tasks.success_criteria: All tags verified via eRank, 10K+ monthly search volume, <5K listings

tasks.task: Set pricing for 5 SKUs (verify ≥60% gross margin)
tasks.success_criteria: Pricing set, margin calculation confirmed, competitive positioning verified

tasks.task: Initial inventory printing (40-50 units mixed SKUs)
tasks.success_criteria: 40-50 units printed, QC passed, organized by SKU

tasks.task: Organize STL files for GitHub upload (folder structure, README, license)
tasks.success_criteria: STL files organized, README.md complete, CC-BY-NC license applied

tasks.task: Send eSUN wholesale inquiry (supplier-negotiation-playbook.md)
tasks.success_criteria: Email sent to eSUN wholesale contact, realistic volume stated, awaiting response

tasks.task: Pre-qualify Anycubic 50kg pallet order (verify pricing and availability)
tasks.success_criteria: Anycubic contacted, 50kg pallet availability confirmed, $10.49/kg verified

phases.description: Product listing upload, Etsy shop launch, first 100 units printed

tasks.task: Upload 5 product listings to Etsy (draft status)
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 listings in draft status, photos uploaded, pricing set, tags assigned

tasks.task: Final review of all listings (pricing, description, photos, tags)
tasks.success_criteria: All listings reviewed, no spelling errors, prices verified, photos optimized

tasks.task: Publish all 5 listings simultaneously (make live on Etsy)
tasks.success_criteria: All 5 listings live on Etsy shop, search results confirm visibility

tasks.task: Verify shop is live (search for ModRun in Etsy, confirm all products visible)
tasks.success_criteria: Shop appears in Etsy search, all 5 products visible, images load correctly

tasks.task: Test purchase flow (add item to cart, verify checkout process)
tasks.success_criteria: Can add item to cart, shipping calculates correctly, payment flow works

tasks.task: Announce launch on social media or email (if applicable)
tasks.success_criteria: Launch announcement posted, Etsy shop URL shared

tasks.task: Print first 100 units for launch inventory (priority: all SKUs represented)
tasks.success_criteria: 100 units printed, QC passed, organized by SKU, ready for order fulfillment

tasks.task: Set up Pirate Ship account for USPS label printing
tasks.success_criteria: Account created, payment method on file, test label generation works

tasks.task: Create print queue tracking spreadsheet (Google Sheets or paper log)
tasks.success_criteria: Spreadsheet ready, columns defined (Order ID, Product, Status, Print time, etc.)

tasks.task: Monitor shop for first 24 hours (check messages, address technical issues)
tasks.success_criteria: No critical errors, customer messages responded to, technical issues resolved

phases.description: Track KPIs, fulfill orders, validate fulfillment workflow, prepare scaling decision

tasks.task: Daily: Check Etsy orders and add to print queue
tasks.success_criteria: Orders added to queue same-day, print jobs started next morning

tasks.task: Daily: Print, finish, and ship orders (2-business-day promise)
tasks.success_criteria: All orders shipped within 2 business days, no delays, tracking provided

tasks.task: Weekly: Review shop analytics (traffic, conversion rate, top products)
tasks.success_criteria: Traffic data collected, conversion rate calculated (target: 0.5-2%), top products identified

tasks.task: Weekly: Review customer messages and respond within 24 hours
tasks.success_criteria: All customer inquiries answered, response time <24 hours

tasks.task: Weekly: Track print success rate (target: ≥97%)
tasks.success_criteria: Failed print rate logged, <3% rejection acceptable, investigate if >5%

tasks.task: Validate fulfillment workflow (meets 2-day promise, quality, shipping)
tasks.success_criteria: Workflow documented, 2-day promise consistently met, zero shipping complaints

tasks.task: Track received orders via customer feedback (check Etsy reviews, messages)
tasks.success_criteria: Customer feedback collected, first reviews appearing, sentiment positive

tasks.task: End-of-week: Reorder inventory (reprint SKUs below 7-day supply trigger)
tasks.success_criteria: Inventory levels maintained, reorder triggers documented, no stockouts

tasks.task: Track return rate (target: <5%)
tasks.success_criteria: Return rate tracked, <5% acceptable, root cause documented if >5%

tasks.task: Mid-month: Analyze supplier responses (eSUN, Anycubic)
tasks.success_criteria: Supplier responses received or follow-up sent, negotiation terms clarified

phases.description: Month 1 wrap-up, analyze metrics, validate assumptions, plan Month 2 scaling

tasks.task: Month 1 KPI Summary: units sold, revenue, COGS, margin, reviews, return rate
tasks.success_criteria: All KPIs summarized: 5-10 sales expected, margin ≥60%, reviews >2, return rate <5%

tasks.task: Validate fulfillment workflow (actual vs. projected timelines, issues identified)
tasks.success_criteria: Workflow validated, 2-day promise met consistently, efficiency measured

tasks.task: Validate COGS actuals vs. projections (material costs, supplier pricing, labor)
tasks.success_criteria: Actual COGS within ±10% of projections, margin targets confirmed or adjusted

tasks.task: Review product feedback (Etsy reviews, customer messages, quality issues)
tasks.success_criteria: Customer feedback summarized, design strengths/weaknesses identified, improvements planned

tasks.task: Finalize supplier partnership (commit to eSUN wholesale or Anycubic pallet if Month 2 demand supports)
tasks.success_criteria: Supplier locked in (wholesale pricing agreed), first Month 2 order placed

tasks.task: Month 2 scaling decision: Add second printer? Expand inventory? Adjust pricing?
tasks.success_criteria: Scaling decision documented, Month 2 operational plan finalized, resource allocation planned

tasks.task: Document Month 1 learnings (print failures, shipping issues, customer preferences, optimization ideas)
tasks.success_criteria: Learnings documented, process improvements identified, Month 2 adjustments planned

phases.description: Execute scaling based on Month 1 results: expand inventory, optimize workflow, track growth

tasks.task: Activate supplier partnership (receive first wholesale filament order)
tasks.success_criteria: First wholesale filament order received, quality validated, COGS reduction confirmed

tasks.task: Scale inventory printing (target: 50-100 units/month based on Month 1 sales)
tasks.success_criteria: 50-100 units printed, organized by SKU, quality consistent, fulfillment capacity validated

tasks.task: Optimize print queue (batch printing, color change efficiency, per-day throughput)
tasks.success_criteria: Print queue optimized, throughput improved to 15+ units/day, efficiency measured

tasks.task: Month 2 KPI tracking (convert rate, units sold, revenue, margin, reviews)
tasks.success_criteria: Month 2 target: 15-25 sales, $300-600 revenue, 5+ reviews, margin ≥60%

tasks.task: Evaluate second printer addition (if Month 2 velocity justifies 100+ units/month capacity)
tasks.success_criteria: Decision made: proceed with printer 2 (if 100+ units/month demand), or continue single printer

tasks.task: Explore adjacent products (if primary sales solid, research Phase 3 candidates per ITEM9)
tasks.success_criteria: Phase 3 product candidates identified (desk accessories, premium bundles, etc.), design roadmap started

phases.description: Success metrics for launch phase completion

success_metrics.measurement: Supplier contract signed or email confirmation

risk_mitigation.mitigation: Extend pre-launch marketing, adjust pricing if competitive analysis suggests too high, review product photos/copy quality
Maintain 2-week inventory buffer, streamline print queue process, plan daily ship times in advance
Validate test print thoroughly, maintain printer (nozzle check, bed leveling weekly), use fresh filament

risk_mitigation.risk: Supplier delays or price increase (filament unavailable or >$15/kg)
risk_mitigation.mitigation: Maintain 3-week inventory buffer, pre-qualify backup supplier (Anycubic), lock in 6-month commitment early
Ensure test print meets quality standards, validate QC process, respond to customer feedback quickly, improve design if needed
Optimize tags/keywords, encourage reviews, maintain fast shipping, respond to messages, consider Etsy ads after Month 1

financial_projections.assumptions: Conservative estimates assuming 5-10 sales Month 1, 15-25 Month 2, 50-80 Month 3. Price represents mix of tiers. COGS based on $11/kg wholesale filament, $0.25 packaging, $4-5 shipping per order.
